name: Guisadong Sitao (Sauteed Long Beans)
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Chinese long beans (sitao), cut into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet over medium heat, sauté garlic in oil until lightly browned.
2. Add onion and tomato slices and cook for 2 minutes.
3. Add pork and soy sauce. Simmer for about 15 minutes or until pork is tender.
4. Add shrimp, long beans, shrimp juice, salt, and pepper. Let cook for another 10-15 minutes or until long beans are tender.
5. Correct seasoning to taste. Transfer to a serving container and serve immediately.
Note: Green beans can be used in place of the long beans in this recipe.
